summary: Full end-to-end testing of WELLDHAN app. All 4 roles tested (User, Trainer, Manager, Admin). 32/32 backend tests passing. All key UI flows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: All family member avatars show 'R' initial instead of first letter of their actual name (e.g., 'Ravi Spouse' shows 'R' but should ideally show a distinct color or label). Minor cosmetic issue.

integration_issues.issue: Navigating to flat /payments resolves to (manager)/payments instead of (user)/payments when logged in as User. Similarly /profile can resolve unexpectedly. However navigation via tab bar and /(user)/payments works correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver not supported in web preview - falls back to JS animation (expected for Expo web, not a real issue)

action_items: Routing conflict: /payments and /profile flat URL resolution can pick (manager) or (trainer) routes instead of (user) routes when logged in as User. Consider adding role-based redirect guards in each group layout to ensure correct route resolution.
Trainer Home: The '4 Today's Sessions' count might need verification - actual session bookings for today may not all belong to trainer's slot.
critical_code_review_comments: URL routing ambiguity: Both (user)/payments and (manager)/payments exist - accessing /payments directly resolves to manager route. Expo Router resolves route groups based on file system order. This should be handled by the AuthGuard redirecting to proper group routes.
server.py is a single 960-line file - could be split into routers for better maintainability but not blocking.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All screens load, all key flows work, minor routing ambiguity on flat URLs

seed_data_creation: Seed data was already present (seeded: false - already seeded). Data verified: 10 households, 4 trainers, 10 slots, 12 food items, payments, bookings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 role flows tested end to end. Backend 100% passing. Splash, Login, OTP, User Home, Booking (slot selection + member modal + confirm), Food Basket, Payments (GPay UPI button), Profile, Trainer Home/Profile, Manager Dashboard, Admin Dashboard all working. Only issue: flat URL routing /payments resolves to manager route instead of user route when accessed directly - but tab navigation works correctly.
rca_of_issue: Route group ambiguity: When navigating to /payments directly (without group prefix), Expo Router picks (manager)/payments over (user)/payments. This is because Expo Router resolves routes alphabetically and 'manager' comes before 'user'. The AuthGuard does redirect logged-in users to their proper group home, but once in the app, programmatic navigation to /payments without the group context can resolve incorrectly. The fix would be to always navigate to /(user)/payments, /(trainer)/home etc. within role-specific navigation.
